content.full_text:
February 28, 1990

Mr. Scott Hallabrin  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 600  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Scott:

This letter confirms our telephone conversation on February 23, 1990. I asked if organizers of the Crime Victims' initiative could send some of their contributors to a Pete Wilson for Governor • 1990 fundraiser as a thank-you for their Crime Victims' contributions. You opined that this arrangement was permissible and not a non-monetary contribution from Pete Wilson for Governor • 1990 to the Crime Victims' initiative.

You reasoned that Crime Victims' donors, not the initiative itself, were benefitting from the invitations and that the situation was similar to an "after-the-fact gift from Wilson to the initiative contributors". You cautioned, however, that Crime Victims' organizers could not call up potential contributors to offer them a "free" ticket to a Pete Wilson fundraising event in return for a contribution to Crime Victims.

Please sign this letter and return it to me if it correctly represents your conclusion. Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[signature]
Lezlee H. Westine

Scott Hallabrin

Date

LHW/df
